query: SELECT q.moduleId, qq.orderIndex, qq.correctIndex FROM quiz_questions qq JOIN quizzes q ON qq.quizId = q.id WHERE q.moduleId = 5 ORDER BY qq.orderIndex;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user M2p26uMeyZfN57L.7f2cda2e67ce --database S5Kvdsbv47gJwCwLVS8V8T --execute SELECT q.moduleId, qq.orderIndex, qq.correctIndex FROM quiz_questions qq JOIN quizzes q ON qq.quizId = q.id WHERE q.moduleId = 5 ORDER BY qq.orderIndex;
